# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: A VPC with public and private subnets for a three-tier application
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: 'VPC'
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: MyVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  VPCRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-RouteTable

  RouteToInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Route
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTable
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-PublicSubnet

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.64/26
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-PrivateSubnet
